Lakecia Todd Smith, Esq. Defendant in Pro Per.

Hearing is held. The Court poses questions to Ms. Smith. The Court instructs parties to talk and settle the matter. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Taken Under Submission.***
